questions.audioText: Lisa: Where did you go on holiday last summer? Mark: I went to Italy with my family. We visited Rome and Florence. The food was amazing!
questions.question: Which countries did Mark visit?

questions.audioText: Hotel clerk: Your room is on the fifth floor. Here is your key. Breakfast is served from seven to ten in the dining room on the ground floor.
questions.question: Where is breakfast served?

questions.audioText: Teacher: For homework, please read chapter four and answer the questions at the end. This is due on Friday. Student: Can we work in pairs? Teacher: No, this is individual work.
questions.question: When is the homework due?

questions.audioText: Man: I'd like to make a reservation for two people tonight at seven. Host: I'm sorry, we're fully booked at seven. We have a table at eight or eight thirty. Man: Eight is perfect.
questions.question: What time will the man have dinner?

questions.audioText: Woman: Excuse me, is there a bank near here? Man: Yes, there's one on Main Street, next to the post office. It's about five minutes' walk.
questions.question: Where is the bank?

questions.audioText: Jack: I started a new job last week. I work in a hospital as a nurse. The hours are long but I love helping people.
questions.question: What is Jack's job?

questions.audioText: Mom: What do you want for your birthday? Daughter: I really want a new phone. Mom: Let me think about it. Daughter: Please, Mom! All my friends have one.
questions.question: What does the daughter want for her birthday?

questions.audioText: Announcer: Flight 782 to London is now boarding at gate twelve. All passengers with children or who need assistance may board now.
questions.question: Which flight is boarding?

questions.audioText: John: I usually get up at six, go for a run, take a shower, and then have breakfast. I leave for work at eight and start at nine.
questions.question: What does John do first after getting up?

questions.audioText: Shop assistant: This jacket is on sale. It was eighty dollars, but now it's only fifty dollars. Customer: That's a good deal. I'll take it.
questions.question: How much does the jacket cost now?
